subStages.name: The Week's Menu
subStages.description: Decide the dinners once, skip the 5 p.m. scramble all week.

steps.name: Week Setup
steps.description: Who you are feeding and what constrains the cooking.

steps.name: Dinner Plan
steps.description: Five weeknight dinners that respect the constraints.
steps.aiPrompt: Draft a dinner plan for the week: five weeknight meals matching the constraints, one new recipe, a leftovers night, and a one-line prep note per meal.

subStages.name: Shopping List
subStages.description: The plan turned into a list the store layout agrees with.

steps.name: Grocery List
steps.aiPrompt: Turn the dinner plan into a grocery list organized by store section, with quantities, checking pantry staples last.

steps.name: Recipe Links
steps.description: The recipes the plan leans on.

subStages.name: Groceries
subStages.description: One trip, the whole list, nothing extra that is not chocolate.

steps.name: Shopping Done
steps.description: Everything on the list is in the kitchen.

subStages.name: Cook Ahead
subStages.description: An hour on Sunday that buys five calm evenings.

steps.name: Prep Notes
steps.description: What to chop, marinate, or batch-cook ahead.
steps.aiPrompt: Draft Sunday prep notes from the dinner plan: what to chop, marinate, or batch-cook ahead, and what stays fresh until the day it is needed.
